6test_order_of_insertion_does_not_matter_between_groups
zJTestTopologicalSort.test_order_of_insertion_does_not_matter_between_groupsc
if 1:
                import graphlib
                ts = graphlib.TopologicalSorter()
                ts.add('blech', 'bluch', 'hola')
                ts.add('abcd', 'blech', 'bluch', 'a', 'b')
                ts.add('a', 'a string', 'something', 'b')
                ts.add('bluch', 'hola', 'abcde', 'a', 'b')
                print(list(ts.static_order()))
                TZ
